name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Sleek paper tasklist
release_notes: Rebuilds the printable tasklist as a sleek, light, non-table Pathmark paper checklist with properly indented child/support items.
notes: Rebuilt the printable PDF tasklist to follow the cleaner old desktop paper style rather than table or card exports.
Removed visible table/grid/card boxes from the PDF tasklist.
Indented supporting time block checkboxes and text together so child tasks read as true nested checklist items.
Kept Pathmark branding visible in a restrained header using the professional wordmark-style treatment.
Improved PDF text cleanup so empty or missing fields do not print as nan/None.
